text: Struggle isn't the opposite of happiness — it's often the path to it.
Self-criticism has no value whatsoever. Beating up oneself for making a mistake is not the path toward positive change.
We live in a hard world, but compassion and kindness also exist in this world. And my choice is to do everything I can to be kind.
Kindness is like a muscle — the more you exercise it, the greater your capacity to feel and extend it.
